name: E2E: every tool in the manifest and every tool any rule binds to is FOSS and free to sell commercially, with all copyleft (GPL/AGPL/LGPL) tools marked invoke_only — the whole catalog is resale-safe
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-commercial-license.sh" 2>cl.txt; ce=$?; ruby -ryaml -rjson -e 'lic={}; JSON.parse(File.read(ARGV[0]))["tools"].each{|t| lic[t["tool"]]=[t["license"].to_s,t["invoke_only"]]}; cl=/GPL|AGPL|LGPL/; bad=[]; Dir[File.join(ARGV[1],"generated-code-quality-standards","*","*.yaml")].each{|f| d=(YAML.unsafe_load_file(f) rescue nil); next unless d.is_a?(Hash); (d["rules"]||[]).each{|ru| Array(ru["enforced_by"]).each{|b| t=b["tool"]; next unless t && lic[t]; bad<<"#{ru["id"]}:#{t}" if cl=~lic[t][0] && !lic[t][1]}}}; exit(bad.empty? ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/toolchain.json" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT" >/dev/null 2>&1; re=$?; [ "$ce" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'commercial-license status=green' cl.txt && [ "$re" -eq 0 ] && echo whole-corpus-sellable 1>&2
